summary: Full e2e testing of Bloom 10-issue batch. All 43 backend tests pass (100%). All P0/P1 frontend features verified. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) always_rated=False bug in /users/:userId/public-profile due to wrong field names, (2) duplicate 'Ostatní' option in SupportPage edit dialog.

minor.issue: Endpoint not implemented - returns 404. Frontend calls it via handleVote in QuestionsPage. vote_count field also missing from QuestionResponse model.

ui_bugs.component: SupportPage - Kategorie select in create/edit dialog
ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate 'Ostatní' option shown when DB already has service type with id='other'. FIXED: Added conditional check to skip hardcoded fallback when DB has 'other' id.
HTML validity warning: nested <button> inside <button>. Vote button (line 317) is inside accordion toggle button (line 310). Browsers may behave unexpectedly.

issues: Avatar disappears briefly during re-render after rating submission - cosmetic flicker only

action_items: Implement /api/questions/{id}/vote endpoint and add vote_count field to QuestionResponse model
Fix LegalPage nested button HTML validity issue: wrap vote action differently (e.g., use div instead of outer button for accordion or inner button for vote)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED by T1: server.py public-profile endpoint used wrong field names (rater_id/rated_user_id) when querying user_ratings collection, but rate_user endpoint stores (from_user_id/to_user_id). already_rated was always False. Fixed to use correct field names.

BUG FIXED by T1: SupportPage.js edit dialog had hardcoded <SelectItem value='other'>Ostatní</SelectItem> after DB-mapped service types, causing 'OstatníOstatní' duplicate. Fixed with conditional render.
MISSING: /questions/{id}/vote endpoint is called by frontend (QuestionsPage handleVote) but does not exist in server.py (returns 404). QuestionResponse model also lacks vote_count field.

HTML_ISSUE: LegalPage.js line 310 wraps accordion card with <button className='w-full text-left'>, and inside it at line 317 there is another <button> for voting. Nested buttons are invalid HTML and may cause unpredictable click behavior.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all P0/P1 features working, minor HTML validity issue in LegalPage)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed specialists (some approved for testing), test users (TEST_ui_regular_4ee12f@bloom.cz / testpass123), test articles, test service types (cleanup attempted). Admin user TestUser1's rating is now 4.7 (3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10-issue batch features tested and working. Two bugs were fixed by this agent (already_rated field names and duplicate Ostatní). The /questions/{id}/vote endpoint is still missing. LegalPage has nested button HTML issue. Admin Obsah tab service-type items don't expose data-testid for test automation (though UI works visually). The specialist filter for full category names works with case-insensitive regex. SupportPage post_type filter tabs (Vše/Nabídky/Poptávky) work. /reset-password public route renders correctly with bad token showing error toast.

already_rated_bug.root_cause: server.py /users/{user_id}/public-profile endpoint queried db.user_ratings with {'rater_id': ..., 'rated_user_id': ...} but the rate_user endpoint saves documents with field names {'from_user_id': ..., 'to_user_id': ...}. The find_one returned None every time, making already_rated always False.
already_rated_bug.reproduction: 1. Rate a user. 2. View their public profile. 3. already_rated shows False, allowing duplicate ratings.
already_rated_bug.mitigation: Fixed field names in the find_one query to match the stored document structure.

duplicate_ostatni_bug.root_cause: SupportPage.js edit dialog had both the DB-mapped service types loop AND a hardcoded <SelectItem value='other'>Ostatní</SelectItem>. The DB already has id='other' name='Ostatní', so it appeared twice.
duplicate_ostatni_bug.reproduction: Open create service dialog and see Kategorie select showing 'OstatníOstatní'.
